title: Coffee Shops in Shanghai + farewell note
html:
Coffee Shops in Shanghai + farewell note

Source: 2024-10-22 Apple Note (modified 2024-12-06). Starts as a coffee-shop recommendation list, ends as a farewell-to-Shanghai gratitude note.

TL;DR

The list (Shanghai coffee spots):

  • OPS Coffee (pricier)
  • Lucky Draw (Beijing West Rd, Jingan; operated by Small Arms Big Heart)
  • Blacksheep Espresso (Maoming Rd, near IAPM)
  • Greybox
  • Blue Bottle (Changan Lu 908, near the river)
  • Yong Kang Lu road (general area)
  • Jonas Emil (person? or shop name?)

The farewell note (added later, near departure):

"Genuinely, thank you for everyone for coming. awesome dinner awesome night I seriously couldn't be more grateful for everybody. Great memory/night to wrap up Shanghai. Love you guys"

Plus a parenthetical raw moment: "What the fuck do I... I'm not trying to chill with only the huzz rn"

Pattern observed

This is a microcosm of Yahir's note style — a practical list (where to get coffee) that morphs into something emotional (a farewell). The two layers coexist in one file. The departing China reflection ingested earlier is the longer-form version of this same farewell impulse.

Open questions

  • Is "Jonas Emil" a person Yahir met in Shanghai, or a coffee shop? (Worth checking adjacent notes.)
  • The "huzz" line is a flash of late-2024 internet vernacular — confirms the china chapter overlapped with terminally-online culture exposure.

Related

  • shanghai
  • china chapter
  • 2024 12 14 departing china
